modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.

properties.observable_contract: `out` uses the input difference `in1 - in2`, preserving the specified differential polarity.
`out` is scaled by the public gain coefficient `kphi` rather than unit gain or an alternate scale.
`out` continuously tracks analog input changes without clocked state, clipping, or single-ended substitution.

title: Linear PFD Gain
